features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to transform your contact center
features.voiceDesc: Predictive dialing, blended call handling, and intelligent routing for maximum agent productivity.
features.omnichannelDesc: WhatsApp, Telegram, Email, SMS - all unified in one powerful platform.
features.aiDesc: Real-time sentiment analysis, AI scoring, and intelligent call transcription.
features.analyticsDesc: Real-time dashboards, performance metrics, and actionable insights.
features.crmDesc: Seamless integration with popular CRM and ERP systems.
features.socialDesc: Facebook, Instagram integration for complete social engagement.

outcomes.headline: Guaranteed Outcomes with
outcomes.description: Connect 6.0 delivers measurable and impactful results across your organization, ensuring a significant return on your investment:
outcomes.productivityDesc: Increase in overall workforce output and agent effectiveness.
outcomes.efficiencyDesc: Improvement across all business processes, from handling inquiries to issue resolution.
outcomes.dataSpeedDesc: Faster analysis of customer interactions for quicker insights and decision-making.
outcomes.costReductionDesc: Significant savings on operational expenses through automation and optimized resource allocation.

topFeatures.headline: Top Features of
topFeatures.description: Explore the innovative functionalities that make Connect 6.0 the leading AI-powered contact center solution.
topFeatures.predictiveDialingDesc: Maximize agent talk time by automatically dialing numbers and connecting available agents only to live calls.
topFeatures.blendedCallsDesc: Seamlessly manage both inbound and outbound calls, optimizing agent productivity and customer service.
topFeatures.ivrDesc: Effortlessly design intuitive interactive voice response menus with a user-friendly visual interface.
topFeatures.stickyAgentsDesc: Ensure customers are routed to the same agent for continuity, enhancing personalization and resolution rates.
topFeatures.inbuiltCrmDesc: Access comprehensive customer data and interaction history directly within the platform for informed service.
topFeatures.socialMediaDesc: Engage customers on popular platforms like Facebook and Instagram for a truly omnichannel experience.
topFeatures.whatsappDesc: Connect via Email, WhatsApp, and SMS, providing diverse options for customer interaction.
topFeatures.thirdPartyCrmDesc: Integrate with existing CRM and ERP systems for a unified data view and streamlined workflows.
topFeatures.sentimentDesc: Understand customer emotions in real-time, allowing supervisors to respond proactively.
topFeatures.scoringDesc: Utilize AI to evaluate agent performance and customer interactions, driving continuous improvement.
topFeatures.biDesc: Gain actionable insights from your data with AI-powered analytics, optimizing strategies and outcomes.
topFeatures.transcriptionDesc: Automatically transcribe voice calls and generate concise summaries for easy review and compliance.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Contact Center?
cta.subtitle: Get 14 days free access to Connect 6.0. No credit card required. Full features included.

footer.description: AI-powered telecom solutions for your business. From advanced Contact Center software to seamless Business Communication apps.

onPremise.title: On-Premise Deployment
onPremise.description: For organizations with strict security requirements or regulatory compliance needs, Connect 6.0 can be deployed entirely within your infrastructure.

cloud.title: Cloud Deployment
cloud.description: Get up and running quickly with our cloud-hosted solution, offering enterprise-grade capabilities without the infrastructure investment.
cloud.feature1: Rapid deployment in days, not months

hybrid.title: Hybrid Options Available:
hybrid.description: Combine the best of both worlds with hybrid deployment, keeping sensitive data on-premise while leveraging cloud scalability for peak periods.

security.title: Unwavering Security &
security.description: Haloocom is built on a foundation of trust and security. Our platforms and operations adhere to the highest international standards, ensuring your data and communications are always protected.
security.footer: Rest assured, your business and customer data are in safe hands with Connect 6.0's comprehensive security framework.

iso.title: ISO Certified
iso.description: Adherence to ISO 9001:2015 for Quality Management and ISO 27001:2013 for Information Security Management, ensuring robust systems and processes.

dpdp.title: AI Solution: DPDP Act Compliant
dpdp.description: Our AI solution fully complies with Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act, ensuring the highest standards of data privacy for Indian users.

gdpr.title: Voice Solution: GDPR Compliant
gdpr.description: Haloocom's voice solutions meet the rigorous requirements of the General Data Protection Regulation, safeguarding customer privacy in the EU.

pci.title: PCI Compliant
pci.description: Our voice solutions are Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) compliant, ensuring secure handling of sensitive payment information.

soc2.title: Datacenters: SOC 2 Compliant
soc2.description: Our data centers undergo independent SOC 2 audits, verifying stringent controls for security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy.

hipaa.title: HIPAA Compliant
hipaa.description: Our Healthcare Products are HIPAA Compliant, ensuring data security with an On-Premise deployment.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Trusted by Industry Leaders
testimonials.subtitle: See what our customers say about Connect 6.0

testimonial1.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonial1.content: Connect 6.0 transformed our call center operations. We saw a 40% increase in agent productivity within the first month.

testimonial2.name: Priya Sharma
testimonial2.content: The AI sentiment analysis feature is a game-changer. Our customer satisfaction scores improved significantly.

testimonial3.name: Ahmed Hassan
testimonial3.content: Seamless integration with our existing CRM and the omnichannel capabilities made migration effortless.

sentiment.title: Advanced Sentiment Analysis
sentiment.description: Transform quality assurance from a time-consuming manual process into an intelligent, scalable system that provides coaching opportunities and ensures compliance across every interaction.

step1.title: Real-Time Transcription
step1.description: Every call is automatically transcribed with industry-leading accuracy, creating searchable text records.

step2.title: Sentiment Detection
step2.description: Our AI analyzes emotional tone, detecting frustration, satisfaction, or urgency.

step3.title: Intelligent Scoring
step3.description: Automated quality audits score agent performance against customizable criteria and compliance standards.

step4.title: Actionable Summaries
step4.description: AI-generated call summaries highlight key points, outcomes, and follow-up actions needed.

businessIntelligence.title: AI-Powered Business Intelligence:
businessIntelligence.titleHighlight: Search at the Speed of Thought
businessIntelligence.subtitle: Google-Like Search Across Voice Data
businessIntelligence.description1: Imagine having the power to search through millions of voice recordings as easily as searching the web. Connect 6.0's revolutionary AI-based Business Intelligence tool transforms your voice data into actionable insights.
businessIntelligence.description2: Our advanced text-based search engine indexes every conversation, making it effortless to find specific interactions, topics, or customer mentions across your entire call history. No more endless listening sessions – just instant, relevant results.
businessIntelligence.feature1: Search millions of recordings in seconds
businessIntelligence.feature2: Natural language queries that understand context
businessIntelligence.feature3: Filter by agent, date, sentiment, or custom parameters

hexaPerformance.title: HEXA AI in Action:
hexaPerformance.description: HEXA AI delivers measurable results that impact your bottom line. Organizations leveraging our voice bot technology see dramatic improvements in efficiency, customer satisfaction, and operational costs within the first quarter of deployment.

stat1.title: Call Resolution Rate
stat1.description: HEXA successfully resolves customer inquiries without human intervention

stat2.title: Capacity Increase
stat2.description: Handle triple the customer interactions with the same team size

stat3.title: Cost Reduction
stat3.description: Lower operational expenses while improving customer satisfaction scores

stat4.title: Response Time
stat4.description: Instant answers that keep customers engaged and satisfied

channels.label: Omnichannel

channels.description: Connect with your customers on their preferred channels. Voice, WhatsApp, Email, SMS, and social media - all unified in a single, powerful dashboard.
channels.benefit1: Unified conversation history across all channels

clients.title: Trusted by
clients.description: Connect 6.0 powers customer interactions for leading organizations across diverse sectors. Our proven platform is trusted by global brands for its reliability, innovation, and impact on the customer experience.
clients.footer: Join the ranks of businesses transforming their customer experience with Connect 6.0.

hexaAI.title: Meet HEXA AI: Your
hexaAI.description: HEXA AI isn't just a bot – it's a versatile digital employee that speaks your customers' language, literally.

feature1.title: 120+ Languages
feature1.description: Interact naturally with customers worldwide in over 120 languages, breaking down communication barriers and expanding your global reach effortlessly.

feature2.title: Multi-Persona Capability
feature2.description: HEXA adapts its personality and approach based on the task – becoming a persuasive sales representative, a patient support specialist, or a firm collections agent as needed.

feature3.title: Always Available
feature3.description: Provide 24/7 customer service without the overhead, handling routine inquiries while seamlessly escalating complex issues to human agents.

hero.title: Powering the Future of
hero.description: Haloocom is at the forefront of AI-powered telecom solutions, revolutionizing how businesses communicate with their customers through cutting-edge voice technology.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: The Amalgamation of AI & Voice Technology
story.paragraph1: The amalgamation of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and voice technology is revolutionizing the way humans interact with machines. Voice technology, once limited to simple phone and chat communication, has evolved dramatically.
story.paragraph2: Haloocom, with its proven expertise of serving over 500 customers and 120K+ active users across 5+ countries, has built cutting-edge enterprise communication systems including IP PBX, Unified Communications, and Contact Center software.
story.paragraph3: We have transformed Voice Tech with the power of AI, leveraging natural language processing (NLP), machine learning, and deep learning to deliver superior customer experiences.

expertTeam.description: Highly skilled engineers offering round-the-clock support
